name: IRS Generator
postCreateCommand: sudo bash -c "echo '127.0.0.1 concept-server' >> /etc/hosts" && cd server && dotnet restore && cd ../client && npm install
postStartCommand: bash -c 'python3 server/concept_server.py & while ! bash -c "echo > /dev/tcp/localhost/8000" 2>/dev/null; do sleep 0.2; done && (cd server && dotnet run &) && cd client && npm run build && npm start'
